# Vector Compose

**Menu:** `Math/Vector`

**Nome serializado:** `VectorCompose`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Vector/VectorComposeNode.java`

## Funcao

Aplica a operacao matematica `Vector Compose` sobre os valores conectados.
